title: NotebookInstance
description: NotebookInstance schema from Amazon SageMaker API

NotebookInstanceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the notebook instance.

NotebookInstanceName.description: The name of the notebook instance.

NotebookInstanceStatus.description: The status of the notebook instance.

InstanceType.description: The type of ML compute instance running the notebook.

RoleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role associated with the instance.

SubnetId.description: The ID of the VPC subnet.

SecurityGroups.description: The security groups associated with the instance.

Url.description: The URL that you use to connect to the Jupyter notebook.

VolumeSizeInGB.description: The size of the ML storage volume in GB.

CreationTime.description: A timestamp indicating when the notebook instance was created.

LastModifiedTime.description: A timestamp indicating when the notebook instance was last modified.
